data.title: Bitcoin To Flourish With Or Without Trump's Support, Says Expert: Fed's Rate Cuts Could Make People More 'Inclined' To Buy BTC
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is expected to reach a six-figure valuation by 2025, according to Nigel Green, CEO of deVere Group. This prediction comes despite the lack of explicit support from U.S. President Donald Trump.

data.title: Big Short Investor Danny Moses Warns Of Economic Risks From Elon Musk's DOGE-Induced Federal Job Cuts
data.description: Financial expert Danny Moses warns of negative economic impact from federal job cuts initiated by DOGE and supported by Elon Musk.

data.title: Bill Gates Calls Pickleball A 'Funny American Game:' But He's Been Obsessed With It For 50 Years And Wants You To Try It Too
data.description: Bill Gates, a longtime fan of pickleball, recently shared his decades-long passion for the sport he calls a "funny American game,".

data.title: Trump Administration's Promotion Of Elon Musk's Tesla Draws Criticism From Experts: 'The Commerce Secretary Is Not Jim Cramer,' Says Former Ethics Counsel
data.description: Members of the Trump administration are facing ethics backlash for openly promoting Tesla, as the EV giant's stock slides.

data.title: Jamie Dimon Reveals He Will Remain JPMorgan's CEO For 'Few More Years,' Jokes He Won't Swear This Time
data.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon addressed employees at a town hall meeting, discussing his future, diversity efforts, and return-to-office policy.
